collision energy: fragmented using higher energy collisional dissociation (normalized collision energy of 35)
enrichment method: quantitative mass spectrometry (MS) using TMT-labeling of immunopurified RNPs
fragmentation method: fragmented using higher energy collisional dissociation
instrument: directly sprayed into a QExactive HF mass-spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nanoFlex ion source
reduction reagent: Samples were reduced with DTT (final 5 mM)
reduction concentration: Samples were reduced with DTT (final 5 mM)
